a:r.a:t: Two stores coexist today: FileMemoryStore (257 lines) and PostgresMemoryStore (831 lines). They don't sync. These 8 changes unify them and close lifecycle gaps.
FileMemoryStore and PostgresMemoryStore operate independently. If Postgres is unavailable, writes go to file store only — no sync back.
Add MemoryFacade that writes to both stores. Postgres is primary; file store is projection. On startup, reconcile file→Postgres drift.
ttl_hint field is set on records but never read. Expired memories stay active forever, polluting context.
Add periodic sweep (cron or on-read): query WHERE ttl_hint < NOW() AND active = TRUE → set active=FALSE. Expose ttl_policy per memory type.
Importance score is static once set. Old memories rank equally with fresh ones, crowding the context window.
Apply time-decay: effective_importance = importance × decay^(days_since_last_used). Tune decay per type (profile=0.99, task_state=0.90).
Duplicate/near-duplicate memories accumulate. No dedup beyond exact canonical_text match.
Nightly job: vector-cluster active records (cosine > 0.92). Merge clusters into single record, supersede originals. Log as consolidation observation.
MemorySelector returns all candidates regardless of confidence. Low-confidence facts injected into prompts.
Filter candidates where confidence < 0.4 before selection. Surface low-confidence memories with [uncertain] tag so agents can verify.
Memories scoped to conversation or user. No way to link related facts across sessions.
Add parent_memory_id FK. When agent references prior conversation memory, link via cross_session_resolve() lookup.
Only soft-delete via supersession. No way to permanently remove PII or archive old records.
Add delete_permanently(memory_id) for PII compliance. Add archive_inactive() to move superseded records to cold storage table.
Keyword search uses ts_rank_cd with English-only tsvector. Non-English content gets poor recall.
Use pg_catalog.simple dictionary for language-agnostic stemming. Add language column; route to language-specific dictionaries at query time.
persistence/postgres/memory_v2.py (831 lines), memory/file_store.py (257 lines), tools/groups/memory.py (114 lines)
